methods.method_name: Correlation Analysis of Atmospheric and Pollen Dispersal Parameters
methods.description: Correlation analyses were conducted to examine the effects of atmospheric parameters on pollen dispersal parameters using Minitab software.

steps.description: Correlation analyses were conducted to examine the effects of atmospheric parameters on pollen dispersal parameters.
steps.searchable_summary: perform correlation analysis between atmospheric and pollen dispersal parameters using Minitab

methods.description: Pollen concentration was measured using columns of Rotorod samplers along the downwind direction to assess horizontal flux profiles of source production and release.

steps.description: Pollen concentration was measured using columns of Rotorod samplers along the downwind direction.
steps.searchable_summary: measure pollen concentration using Rotorod samplers

steps.description: Pollen grains were collected on a transparent plastic microscope slide fixed on a rotating rod.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollen grains on microscope slides

methods.description: 3-D wind velocities and other meteorological parameters were measured in the source field using a sonic anemometer and weather station.

steps.description: 3-D wind velocities were measured in the source field with a sonic anemometer placed at 1.3 m above the canopy.
steps.searchable_summary: measure 3-D wind velocities using a sonic anemometer

steps.description: Solar radiation, air temperature, relative humidity, and rainfall were measured by a weather station.
steps.searchable_summary: measure meteorological parameters using a weather station

methods.method_name: Data Processing of Concentration and Deposition
methods.description: Pollen grains on each slide were counted using a microscope to determine pollen deposition rate and concentration.

steps.description: Pollen grains on each slide were counted using a microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen grains on slides using a microscope

steps.description: The pollen deposition rate was determined using the total number of pollen grains and the duration of each experimental period.

methods.method_name: Data Processing of Horizontal Flux and Source Strength
methods.description: The horizontal flux of pollen and source strength were calculated using pollen concentration, wind speed, and plant density data.

steps.description: The horizontal flux of pollen at height z was calculated from pollen concentration and wind speed.
Source strength was calculated using deposition, integrated horizontal flux, and plant density.
